title: Breast Milk Banks - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Breast Milk Banks 3 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST MOTHERS MILK BANK HUMAN DONOR MILK PROVISION TO HOSPITALIZED INFANTS AND OUTPATIENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides donated milk to premature and medically vulnerable infants. Healthy babies may be able to obtain milk if supply allows. All milk donors are screened for health concerns and communicable diseases. Donated milk is pasteurized and tested before distribution. 15875 SW 74th Avenue Suite 100 Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm, Friday 9am-3pm. Drop off location hours vary. Email (503) 469-0955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SISKIYOU PEDIATRIC CLINIC NORTHWEST MOTHERS MILK BANK DROP SITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF "Milk drop" site for Northwest Mothers Milk Bank. 700 SW Ramsey Avenue Suite 204 Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Subject to health screening and blood test Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1:30pm-5pm (503) 469-0955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST MOTHERS MILK BANK HUMAN DONOR MILK PROVISION TO HOSPITALIZED INFANTS AND OUTPATIENTS SISKIYOU PEDIATRIC CLINIC NORTHWEST MOTHERS MILK BANK DROP SITE
